en: How do you go to the block-house?
I drive to the block-house.
How does he go to the hospital?
He walks to the hospital.
How do you go to Penghu?
I go to Penghu by plane.
How do you go to Penghu?
I go to Penghu by boat.
I go to Penghu by boat.
I go home by MRT.
How does Panay go to school?
Panay goes to school by train.
How does Kacaw go to church?
Kacaw goes to church by bicycle.
Do you go to school by MRT?
No, I go to school by bus.
Do you go to school by bicycle?
Yes, I go to school by bicycle.
Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?
Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: Pakacinamalay iri pakahikoki^ kiso a talaPosong?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: Pakahikoki^ kako, kitahenayan no hikoki^ ko cinamalay.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: Pakafaso^ iri pakapaliding kiso a talakiwkay?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: Pakapaliding kako, kitahenayan no paliding ko faso^.
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: Maraay ko patiyamay nani loma’ namo hay?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: Caay ka ngata^, paka-u-tu-fay kako a talapatiyamay.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: Manga:ta^ ko yo-fing nani picodadan hay?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: Manga:ta^, rakat han i, tangasa^ to.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: Manga:ta^ ko kamaenan nani cya-taw hay?
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.

ab: Nani cya-taw, lima^ seli’ no tatokian i, tangasa^ to.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
